name: deployhq-mcp-server
description: Manage deployment projects, servers, and deployments on DeployHQ via AI assistants.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List all projects in the DeployHQ account

tools.name: get_project
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific project

tools.name: list_servers
tools.description: List all servers configured for a project

tools.name: list_deployments
tools.description: List deployments for a project with pagination

tools.name: get_deployment
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific deployment

tools.name: get_deployment_log
tools.description: Get the deployment log for debugging

tools.name: create_deployment
tools.description: Create a new deployment for a project

deployhq_api_key.title: DeployHQ API Key
deployhq_api_key.description: API key from Settings > Security in DeployHQ
